subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer in the path of Truth! Through the dominion of the people wert thou compelled to journey from Gilan to Tihran, becoming a wanderer and homeless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره حق از تسلط خلق مجبور بر رحلت از گیلان بطهران گشتی و آواره و سرگردان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital
